title: Project index
body: Quick links for reviewing the reusable starter, section library, and development workspaces while the dev server is running.

links.label: Projects
links.description: Open local project workspaces, generated packets, saved strategy work, and page-copy outputs.

links.label: North Star strategy
links.description: Open the current strategy workspace and saved page-copy fields for the North Star HVAC test project.

links.label: Prompt Library
links.description: Copy the packet, digest, strategy, page-copy, and QA prompts used by the current workflow.

links.label: Layout Preview
links.description: Preview saved strategy/page copy as live page layouts, choose section layouts, and stage final pages.

links.label: Staged Pages
links.description: Review staged pages, remove staged pages, and open pages for minor manual edits.

links.label: Pagebuilder
links.description: Compose, swap, and review reusable page section recipes.

links.label: Content Editor
links.description: Open staged or generated page content for manual copy overrides after the strategy/template flow.

links.label: Style guide
links.description: Review shared visual tokens and section defaults.

links.label: HVAC style preview
links.description: Preview the style guide tokens on the HVAC service reference page.

links.label: Dev admin
links.description: Development admin surface for local tool checks.

links.label: Section library
links.description: Browse the current reusable section collection.

links.label: Layout preview labels
links.description: Review the active semantic section labels through the layout selector and live preview.

links.label: Style tokens
links.description: Inspect typography, colors, spacing, surfaces, and component defaults.

links.label: HVAC service
links.description: Current public example service page using the shared section system.

links.label: Client intake
links.description: Choose an intake path for different local business types.

links.label: Home services intake
links.description: Direct link to the home-services intake variant.

links.label: Contractors intake
links.description: Direct link to the contractor intake variant.

links.label: Property services intake
links.description: Direct link to the property-services intake variant.

links.label: Appointment intake
links.description: Direct link to the appointment-based intake variant.

links.label: Dev dashboard
links.description: Internal view for reviewing leads and client-intake submissions.

links.label: Dashboard
links.description: Reusable client-site lead dashboard route for authenticated workflows.

links.label: Login
links.description: Authentication entry point.

links.label: Thank you
links.description: Post-submission confirmation page.

links.label: Privacy policy
links.description: Reusable privacy page shell.

links.label: Terms
links.description: Reusable terms page shell.
